svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="dYiaQ4LQxCuh_thSenbq"> <mxGraphModel dx="1042" dy="626" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="1" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="\begin{aligned} (1)\ G_{POA} &amp;= DNI·cos(\theta) + DHI·\frac{1+cos{\beta}}{2} \\ (2)\ cos(\theta) &amp;= cos(\theta_z)·cos(\beta) + sin(\theta_z)·cos(\gamma_s - \gamma_p)·sin(\beta) \end{aligned}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1130" y="110" width="390" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1167" y="175" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1167" y="254" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="\begin{aligned} (3)\ cos(\theta) &amp;= A·cos(\beta) + B·sin(\beta) \end{aligned}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1128.5" y="240" width="350" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="\begin{equation} Sustituyendo\ (3)\ en\&nbsp; (1)\ y\ reagrupando \end{equation}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1157.25" y="310" width="292.5" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="\begin{equation} Ecuaciones\ de \ partida \end{equation}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1206" y="80" width="195" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="\begin{aligned} (4)\ G_{POA}(\beta) &amp;=&nbsp; cos(\beta)·(DNI·A + \frac{1}{2}·DHI) + sin(\beta)·(DNI·B) + \frac{1}{2}DHI \end{aligned}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="330" width="490" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="\begin{equation} Maximización:\ Derivada\ =\ 0 \end{equation}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1175" y="390" width="240" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="\begin{aligned}&nbsp; \frac{\partial G_{POA}(\beta)}{\partial \beta} &amp;=&nbsp; -sin(\beta)·(DNI·A + \frac{1}{2}·DHI) + cos(\beta)·(DNI·B) = 0 \end{aligned}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="420" width="460" height="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="\begin{equation} Dividiendo\ entre\ el\ coseno\ y\ resolviendo \end{equation}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1148" y="485" width="294" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="\begin{aligned}&nbsp; tan(\beta) &amp;= \frac{DNI·B}{DNI·A + \frac{1}{2}·DHI} \\&nbsp;&nbsp;\beta &amp;= arctan\left(\frac{DNI·B}{DNI·A + \frac{1}{2}·DHI}\right)&nbsp;\end{aligned}" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1120" y="530" width="260" height="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" edge="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="1100" y="110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="1600" y="110" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="" style="endArrow=none;html=1;rounded=0;" g.data-latex: \begin{aligned} (1)\ G_{POA} &= DNI·cos(\theta) + DHI·\frac{1+cos{\beta}}{2} \\ (2)\ cos(\theta) &= cos(\theta_z)·cos(\beta) + sin(\theta_z)·cos(\gamma_s - \gamma_p)·sin(\beta) \end{aligned}
\begin{aligned} (1)\ G_{POA} &= DNI·cos(\theta) + DHI·\frac{1+cos{\beta}}{2} \\ (2)\ cos(\theta) &= cos(\theta_z)·cos(\beta) + sin(\theta_z)·cos(\gamma_s - \gamma_p)·sin(\beta) \end{aligned}
